title: serkan-uslu/ollama-explorer
summary: Find, filter and compare 200+ Ollama AI models fast. Built with Next.js 16, React 19 & TypeScript 5.

title: Destrayon/Connapse
summary: Open-source AI-powered knowledge management platform for AI agents. Transform documents into searchable knowledge with hybrid vector + keyword search. Built with .NET 10 Blazor.

title: Alex8791-cyber/cognithor
summary: Cognithor · Agent OS — fully local, Ollama-powered, autonomous agent operating system with 15 LLM providers, PGE Trinity architecture, 17 channels, and MCP integration. Early Alpha

title: Miosa-osa/OSA
summary: OSA: the Optimal System Agent. One AI that maximizes signal, eliminates noise, and finds the optimal path — across code, work, and life. Elixir/OTP. Runs locally. Open-source OpenClaw alternative.

title: hex/zsh-ai-prompt
summary: Zsh plugin for inline AI-powered shell command generation

title: lexxai/ollama-deproxy
summary: A lightweight, feature-rich proxy for Ollama, designed for development, testing, and staging environments. It simplifies access to remote Ollama instances that are wrapped behind another proxy layer.

title: sameeeeeeep/autoclawd
summary: Ambient AI for macOS that works without the need to prompt. Uses local intelligence to continuously listen to your conversations, understand your world, find tasks across work and life, and uses Claude Code CLI to autonomously complete them.

title: MarlBurroW/kinbot
summary: Self-hosted AI agents with persistent memory, real identity, and collaboration. One process, one SQLite file, zero cloud.

title: ajitpratap0/openclaw-cortex
summary: Hybrid semantic memory system for AI agents — vector search, smart capture, multi-factor recall. Built with Go, Qdrant, Ollama.

title: overcuriousity/wintermute
summary: Wintermute is a totally harmless, Matrix-based AI assistant designed to learn, adapt and get complex tasks done. Focus on efficiency and small-local llm.

title: Luiz184/gokin-sdk
summary: 🤖 Build AI agents with Go featuring multi-agent orchestration, planning, tool use, and support for Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic, and Ollama.

title: bunburysniper/BleuNova-AI-Agent
summary: 🤖 Build and run a self-hosted, secure AI agent for tasks like messaging, smart browsing, and home automation with ethical safeguards.

title: kattimatti22/vibecode-playground
summary: 🚀 Build and test Next.js apps quickly with a ready-to-run playground using create-next-app and optimized font loading.

title: avarose57/ai-agent-wikipedia-n8n
summary: 🤖 Automate answering questions using a local AI agent that integrates Wikipedia and n8n workflows with LangChain and Ollama models.

title: meganerd/electrictown
summary: Provider-agnostic multi-agent coding orchestrator in Go. Unified router for any LLM provider (Ollama local+cloud, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini) with role-based model assignment, fallback chains, and cost tracking. Inspired by gastown and LiteLLM.

title: elophanto/EloPhanto
summary: Your best friend and personal assistant. Self-evolving.

title: knortzwellez/shellguard
summary: 🛡️ Enable secure, read-only SSH access for LLM agents to audit servers, run diagnostics, and inspect logs without risking data changes.

title: estrify/ProjectLodestar
summary: 🌟 Optimize AI development with Lodestar by smartly routing between free local and premium LLM models to cut costs by over 90%.

title: Tpain166/claude-dashboard
summary: 🛠 Manage Claude Code sessions with a TUI featuring real-time monitoring, conversation history, and automatic session detection.
